Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.type

Interface IAbilityLaser

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction, IAbilityEnergyProjectile
    public interface IAbilityLaser
extends IAbilityEnergyProjectile
    API interface for Laser abilities. Sweeping beam that follows the caster's look vector.

      • getLaserWidth

        float getLaserWidth()
        Returns:
        Width of the laser beam in blocks.

      • setLaserWidth

        void setLaserWidth​(float width)
        Parameters:
        width - Laser beam width in blocks.

      • getExpansionSpeed

        float getExpansionSpeed()
        Returns:
        Speed at which the laser extends to its max length, in blocks per tick.

      • setExpansionSpeed

        void setExpansionSpeed​(float speed)
        Parameters:
        speed - Expansion speed in blocks per tick.

      • getMaxLength

        float getMaxLength()
        Returns:
        Maximum length the laser can reach in blocks.

      • setMaxLength

        void setMaxLength​(float maxLength)
        Parameters:
        maxLength - Maximum laser length in blocks.
